briefdescription.para: checks whether key type value is supported

simplesect.para: string representation of key type value

detaileddescription.para:
Take a SHA-256 hash from string
input
to be hashed
hashed bytes

Take a SHA-256 hash from bytes
input
to be hashed
hashed bytes

briefdescription.para: outputs object of type VRFOutput to stream
decodes object of type VRFOutput from stream
